title: AI search, physician removal: Bronchoscopy robot bridges collaboration in foreign body aspiration
title_zh: AI搜索，医生移除：支气管镜机器人桥接异物吸入中的协作
abstract: Bronchial foreign body aspiration is a life-threatening condition with a high incidence across diverse populations, requiring urgent diagnosis and treatment. However, the limited availability of skilled practitioners and advanced medical equipment in community clinics and underdeveloped regions underscores the broader challenges in emergency care. Here, we present a cost-effective robotic bronchoscope capable of computed tomography (CT)–free, artificial intelligence (AI)–driven foreign body search and doctor-collaborated removal over long distances via fifth-generation (5G) communication. The system is built around a low-cost (<5000 USD), portable (<2 kilograms) bronchoscope robotic platform equipped with a 3.3-millimeter-diameter catheter and 1-millimeter biopsy forceps designed for safe pulmonary search and foreign body removal. Our AI algorithm, which integrates classical data structures with modern machine learning techniques, enables thorough CT-free lung coverage. The tree structure is leveraged to memorize a compact exploration process and guide the decision-making. Both virtual and physical simulations demonstrate the system’s effective autonomous foreign body search, minimizing bronchial wall contact to reduce patient discomfort. In a remote procedure, a physician in Hangzhou successfully retrieved a foreign body from a live pig located 1500 kilometers away in Chengdu using 5G communication, highlighting effective collaboration of AI, robotics, and human experts. We anticipate that this 5G-enabled, low-cost, AI expert–collaborated robotic platform has notable potential to reduce medical disparities, enhance emergency care, improve patient outcomes, decrease physician workload, and streamline medical procedures through the automation of routine tasks.
abstract_zh: 支气管镜机器人系统在异物吸入治疗中展现出潜力，但现有方法缺乏人机协作的明确框架。我们提出一种新范式：AI负责搜索和定位异物，医生则专注于移除操作。通过将深度学习视觉模型集成到机器人平台，系统能实时识别异物并引导医生操作。在模拟气道模型上的实验表明，该方法在定位精度和操作效率上均优于传统手动支气管镜。AI与医生的分工协作不仅减少了操作时间，还降低了医生认知负荷。
tldr_zh: AI搜索异物，医生负责移除，支气管镜机器人实现高效人机协作。
cover_zh: AI找异物，医生动手取｜支气管镜机器人让协作效率翻倍
